rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"When verifying existing @kody behavior, check ship stage in engine source — PR title construction logic is there, not in agent code.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Verified: PR title = `${prefix}: ${issue_title}` where prefix comes from task_type field and issue_title from the `# ` heading in task.md.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"decision","text":"task_type mapping: feature→feat, bugfix→fix, chore→chore (default). Only these types affect the prefix.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
